title: Specify Item, Task or Project type board in the API
excerpt: When I create a new board in the API it always defaults to the main column being called Item. Is there a way to specify that I want a board which manages Tasks or Projects instead? (Mimicking the behavior of the UI which…

posts.author: ITguy (Jim Thomas)
posts.cookedHtml: When I create a new board in the API it always defaults to the main column being called Item. Is there a way to specify that I want a board which manages Tasks or Projects instead? (Mimicking the behavior of the UI which asks when you create a new board.)

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @ITguy,

You can query for the item_terminology when querying for a board, but you can not choose it via API when creating boards.

It can only be chosen when the board is created manually.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias
